Stone Crafted
to Endure

Custom fireplaces, mantels, outdoor fire pits, and masonry built by hand — designed to transform your space and last a lifetime.

What We Build

Craftsmanship in
Every Stone

From dramatic indoor fireplaces to serene outdoor retreats, every project is designed with intention and installed with precision. No shortcuts. No prefab. Just real stonework.

🔥

Custom Fireplaces

Indoor stone fireplaces built to anchor your living space — floor-to-ceiling statement pieces or refined, understated surrounds.

🪨

Fireplace Mantels

Handcrafted stone mantels in natural, veneer, and cultured stone. Custom profiles to match your home's character.

🌿

Outdoor Fireplaces

Covered patio fireplaces, freestanding outdoor hearths, and built-in designs that extend your living space outdoors.

⭕

Fire Pits & Rings

Custom stone fire pits and circular rings — the centerpiece for every backyard gathering, built to withstand the elements.

🛡️

Chimney Caps

Lifetime Warranty

Custom stone and masonry chimney caps built to protect against weather, pests, and debris — backed by a lifetime warranty.

🏛️

Architectural Stone Elements

Columns, pilasters, corbels, keystones, and window surrounds — custom architectural stonework, interior and exterior, for walls, foundations, and accent features.

🪟

Custom Balconies

Juliet cantilevered balconies and full walk-out designs — engineered stonework that adds dimension and curb appeal to any home.

🧱

Custom Masonry

Retaining walls, steps, patios, walkways, waterfall elements, and structural stonework. Built to code, built to last.

🔧

Repair & Restoration

Plaster, stucco, and stone repair and restoration — preserving historic character while reinforcing structural integrity for years to come.

Who We Are

Built on
Integrity

Creative Stonework Designs was founded on a simple belief: stonework should be done right, or not at all. Every project is handled personally by our crew — no subcontracting, no cutting corners. We take the time to understand your vision and build something you'll be proud of for decades.

We serve residential and commercial clients across Western New York, from initial design consultation through final installation.

15+
Years of Experience
500+
Projects Completed
100%
Self-Performed Work
WNY
